title: SuperRooTask
description: A unit of work tracked through the SuperRoo 11-state lifecycle.

status.description: Current position in the task lifecycle state machine

goal.description: Natural language description of what this task must accomplish

repoPath.description: Absolute path to the repository being modified

branch.description: Git branch created or used for this task

riskLevel.description: Risk classification — influences whether needs_user_approval is triggered

costUsd.description: Cumulative API cost in USD for this task run

events.description: Ordered list of SuperRooEvent objects emitted during the task

repairCount.description: Number of times the task entered the repairing state

failureSignature.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the last failure (test name + error + file) for escalation detection
